name: Multiple directories or focus one for Houston AI?

mainEntity.name: Multiple directories or focus one for Houston AI?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Multiple (3-5) for patterns AI detects; one insufficient.** Cross-references build trust. **Key factors:** 1) Variety by tier; 2) Practice fit; 3) Update cadence; 4) Cost spread. Prioritize top 2, add others. Breadth wins.[1][3]
